name: Pirosmani Georgian Food Art
notes: Produces and sells khachapuri both fresh and frozen — this is extremely high cheese volume per unit compared to restaurant service. Located next door to Stumara restaurant; shares kitchen. Sells both fresh and frozen Georgian food products. Operates as a retail/deli as well as a production facility for Stumara.

name: Saami Somi

One of Philadelphia's most-visited indoor markets.
